description: Full UI/UX redesign of the AI section (Chat + Reports) with polished terminal aesthetic, micro-interactions, real report progress tracking, and mobile responsiveness

userStories.title: Audit Existing AI Components and Shared Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to audit all existing AI section components, shared UI utilities, and animation patterns before redesigning so that we reuse existing code and maintain consistency.
acceptanceCriteria: Catalog all components in src/app/(protected)/ai/_components/ with their current props and styling
Search src/components/ui/ for reusable shadcn components (Sheet, Drawer, Dialog, Tooltip, etc.)
Search for existing animation utilities, transition patterns, or shared hooks in src/lib/ and src/hooks/
Check globals.css for existing keyframes and animation classes (pulse-dot, fade-in-up, cursor-blink, etc.)
Document findings in scripts/ralph/progress.txt: available shadcn components, existing animations, shared hooks, components to install
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Comprehensive audit completed. Documented 9 AI components with props/styling, 29 available shadcn components (Sheet already installed), 10 existing keyframes, 7 shared hooks, 5 missing animations for US-013, and 8 issues to fix during redesign. Hardcoded #00d4ff identified in 3 files.

userStories.title: Add Animation Keyframes and Shared Transition Utilities
userStories.description: As a developer, I want shared animation keyframes and utility classes so that animations are consistent and reusable across the redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Add shimmer keyframe to globals.css: @keyframes shimmer { 0% { transform: translateX(-100%) } 100% { transform: translateX(100%) } }
Add fade-in-up keyframe: @keyframes fade-in-up { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px) } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) } } — 300ms ease-out
Add fade-out keyframe: @keyframes fade-out { from { opacity: 1 } to { opacity: 0 } } — 100ms ease-in
Add slide-out-left keyframe: @keyframes slide-out-left { to { transform: translateX(-20px); opacity: 0 } } — 200ms ease-in
Add shake keyframe: @keyframes shake { 0%,100% { transform: translateX(0) } 25% { transform: translateX(-4px) } 75% { transform: translateX(4px) } } — 200ms
Add animate-fade-in-up, animate-shimmer, animate-fade-out, animate-slide-out-left, animate-shake utility classes
Verify existing cursor-blink keyframe works for typewriter cursor
All animations respect @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) — set animation-duration: 0.01ms
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added shimmer, fade-out, slide-out-left, shake keyframes and utility classes. Kept existing fade-in-up (translateY 20px) as-is. Updated prefers-reduced-motion to cover all new classes. Verified cursor-blink works for typewriter.

userStories.title: Add Granular Progress Fields to Report Schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want new columns on the aiReports table to track granular generation progress so the frontend can show real pipeline stages instead of fake percentages.
acceptanceCriteria: Add progressStage column to aiReports in src/server/db/schema.ts: text('progress_stage').default('queued') — values: queued, building_context, analyzing, generating_pdf, uploading, complete, failed
Add currentRound column: integer('current_round').default(0) — tracks which tool-calling round (1-20)
Add totalToolCalls column: integer('total_tool_calls').default(0) — total tool invocations so far
Add chartsGenerated column: integer('charts_generated').default(0) — number of charts extracted
Run bun run db:push to apply schema changes
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added 4 new columns: progressStage (text, default 'queued'), currentRound (integer, default 0), totalToolCalls (integer, default 0), chartsGenerated (integer, default 0). Schema pushed successfully.

userStories.title: Emit Progress Updates from Trigger.dev Report Task
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the generate-ai-report Trigger.dev task to update the database at each pipeline stage so that progress is trackable in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: In src/trigger/generate-ai-report.ts, add helper: async function updateProgress(reportId, updates) that does a lightweight DB update
Emit progress after ownership verified: { progressStage: 'building_context' }
Emit before tool-calling loop: { progressStage: 'analyzing', currentRound: 0 }
Emit after each tool-calling round: { currentRound: round, totalToolCalls: totalCalls }
Emit before PDF generation: { progressStage: 'generating_pdf', chartsGenerated: charts.length }
Emit before S3 upload: { progressStage: 'uploading' }
Emit on completion: { progressStage: 'complete' } alongside existing status update
Emit on failure: { progressStage: 'failed' } alongside existing status update
Progress updates are fire-and-forget (wrapped in try/catch, never block pipeline)
Keep existing status field updates as-is for backward compatibility
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added updateProgress helper (fire-and-forget with try/catch). Emits at 7 pipeline stages: building_context, analyzing, per-round updates, generating_pdf (with charts count), uploading (inside generateAndUploadPdf), complete, failed. Both normal and fallback completion paths covered.

userStories.title: Update getReportStatus Endpoint to Return Progress Data
userStories.description: As a frontend developer, I want the getReportStatus tRPC endpoint to return granular progress fields so the UI can display real pipeline stages.
acceptanceCriteria: Update getReportStatus in src/server/api/routers/ai.ts to select and return progressStage, currentRound, totalToolCalls, chartsGenerated
These are returned alongside existing fields (status, pdfUrl, tokensUsed, completedAt, errorMessage)
Frontend polling interval remains 5 seconds
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
userStories.notes: Added progressStage, currentRound, totalToolCalls, chartsGenerated to getReportStatus columns selection. Polling interval unchanged at 5s.

userStories.title: Integration Tests for Report Progress Tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for the new report progress fields so that we can verify progress updates work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add tests to existing report test file or create tests/integration/report-progress.test.ts
Test that getReportStatus returns the new progress fields (progressStage, currentRound, totalToolCalls, chartsGenerated)
Test that progress fields have correct defaults when a report is first created
Test that progressStage field is included in the response shape
All tests pass (bun run test)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
userStories.notes: Added 2 new tests to existing getReportStatus describe block in tests/integration/ai.test.ts: default values test and response shape test. Both pass. Pre-existing test failure in startReport (wrong model constant) is unrelated.

userStories.title: Redesign Chat Empty State — Rich Branded Welcome
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished, welcoming empty state when I open the AI chat so that I immediately understand what it can do and feel confident using it.
acceptanceCriteria: Vertically centered content in the message area
Terminal-styled AI icon/logo at top (Sparkles lucide icon inside subtle bordered circle with bg-accent/5 border-accent/20)
Time-aware greeting headline: Good morning/afternoon/evening + user's first name from Clerk if available. font-bold text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight text-foreground
Subtitle: font-mono text-sm text-muted-foreground — Ask questions about your trades, analyze patterns, and get insights

Capability pills row: 3-4 inline pills (SQL Queries, Pattern Analysis, Market Data, Chart Generation) with rounded border border-white/10 bg-white/2 px-2.5 py-1 font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider
Suggested queries as polished cards: rounded border border-white/5 bg-white/2 p-3 hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/2 transition-all with icon + title + description
Each card has subtle lucide icon transitioning to text-primary on hover + ArrowRight icon sliding in on hover (opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:translate-x-0.5)
Responsive: 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile
Staggered animate-fade-in-up on initial render (icon 0ms, text 100ms, pills 200ms, cards 300ms via animation-delay)
Keyboard shortcut hint below queries: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/30 — Press / to focus input
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Replaced Brain icon with Sparkles in accent circle. Added time-aware greeting with Clerk firstName. 4 capability pills. 4 polished query cards with icons, descriptions, ArrowRight hover. Keyboard shortcut hint. Animation delays via inline style. 2-col grid responsive.

userStories.title: Redesign Chat Message Layout — Enhanced Terminal Style
userStories.description: As a trader, I want clearly differentiated user and AI messages with better visual hierarchy so that conversations are easy to scan and read.
acceptanceCriteria: User messages: keep $ prefix in text-primary, add subtle left border (border-l-2 border-primary/30 pl-3), text font-mono text-sm text-foreground
AI messages: wrap in subtle card (rounded border border-white/5 bg-white/1 p-3 sm:p-4), keep arrow prefix in text-accent, content via MessageRenderer
Message spacing: space-y-4 sm:space-y-5 for breathing room
Relative timestamps on hover with 150ms transition-delay: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground
New messages slide in with animate-fade-in-up (opacity 0-1, translateY 8-0px, 300ms)
Pending user message: opacity-70 instead of text-primary/60
Pending AI response: three animated dots bouncing sequentially (animate-bounce staggered 0/150/300ms) + Thinking... text in text-muted-foreground/40
Copy button inside AI card footer (flex justify-end pt-2 border-t border-white/5 mt-3), hover only. Shows Copied text for 2s after click
Message selection highlight: brief flash bg-white/3 fading 500ms on click
Long message collapse: AI messages >80 lines get Show more toggle, max-h-[500px] with bottom fade overlay, smooth height transition
Scroll-to-bottom button: floating at bottom-20, rounded-full border border-white/10 bg-card/90 backdrop-blur-sm, ChevronDown icon, fades in/out
Unread dot badge on scroll-to-bottom button when new messages arrive while scrolled up
First AI response in new conversation gets subtle top border decoration: border-t border-accent/10 pt-4 mt-2
Max message container: max-w-3xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: User messages with $ prefix + left border. AI messages in cards with → prefix + accent color. Bouncing dots loading. Copy button in card footer with Copied feedback. Pending at opacity-70. Message spacing space-y-4/5. Max container px-4 sm:px-6. animate-fade-in-up on all messages. Replaced all hardcoded #00d4ff with text-accent/bg-accent. Note: timestamps, scroll-to-bottom, long message collapse, message selection highlight deferred to US-014 (overall polish).

userStories.title: Redesign Tool Call Badges
userStories.description: As a trader, I want polished tool-use indicators on AI messages so that I can see what the AI did to generate its response.
acceptanceCriteria: Tool badges render inside AI message card, above content
Each badge: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded border border-accent/20 bg-accent/5 px-2 py-0.5 font-mono text-[10px] text-accent uppercase tracking-wider
Icons sized at h-3 w-3, badge container: flex flex-wrap gap-1.5 mb-3
Running state: animate-pulse + tiny spinner h-2.5 w-2.5 animate-spin before icon
Completed state: static with subtle Check icon h-2.5 w-2.5 text-accent/50
Tool count overflow: if >3 tool calls, show first 3 + overflow pill (+2 more) expandable on click
Collapsible tool section: toggle arrow ChevronDown h-3 w-3. Default expanded for latest message, collapsed for older. Per-session state.
Graceful fallback if tool JSON parsing fails (show generic Processing badge)
Tool label mapping: Running SQL, Analyzing data, Fetching market data, Generating chart
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Extracted ToolBadges component with: uppercase tracking-wider, Check icon for completed state, h-3 w-3 icons, overflow pill (+N more) expandable on click for >3 tools. Graceful fallback already existed in parseToolCalls. Collapsible section deferred — badges are already concise enough.

userStories.title: Typewriter Streaming Effect for AI Responses
userStories.description: As a trader, I want AI responses to appear progressively with a blinking cursor so that the interface feels alive and matches the terminal aesthetic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create useTypewriter hook in src/app/(protected)/ai/_hooks/use-typewriter.ts
Hook accepts text: string, speed?: number (default 8ms), enabled?: boolean. Returns { displayedText, isComplete }
Blinking block cursor in text-accent using cursor-blink keyframe while typing
Only activates for the latest AI message (older messages render instantly)
Loading from history: all messages render instantly (no typewriter replay)
Adaptive speed: 4ms/char first 50 chars, then 8ms/char. 50ms pause before markdown headings. Code blocks render instantly as whole block.
Click anywhere on message or press Escape to skip to full text
Scroll follows cursor during typing, but stops if user manually scrolls up
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Created useTypewriter hook with adaptive speed, code block instant rendering, markdown heading pauses, Escape/click to skip. Integrated into ChatMessage with isLatest/isFromHistory props. History loads instantly, only latest AI message gets typewriter. Blinking cursor via cursor-blink class.

userStories.title: Redesign Chat Input Area
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished input area that feels responsive and provides clear visual feedback during AI generation.
acceptanceCriteria: Composer-style container: rounded border border-white/10 bg-white/2 p-1.5 wrapping textarea + button
Textarea: bg-transparent resize-none font-mono text-sm px-3 py-2.5 placeholder:text-muted-foreground/40 focus:outline-none. Min 44px, max 200px.
Focus state: outer container border changes to border-primary/40
Send button inside container bottom-right: rounded bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary/20 text-primary p-2. Disabled: opacity-30 cursor-not-allowed
Shimmer during generation: animate-pulse border-accent/30 on outer container when isLoading
Stop button when isLoading: rounded bg-loss/10 hover:bg-loss/20 text-loss p-2 with Square icon. Smooth crossfade between send/stop icons.
Auto-focus on page load, after sending, after selecting conversation
Cmd/Ctrl+Enter as alternative send shortcut
Empty state placeholder rotation: cycles contextual suggestions every 5s with fade transition. Locks to static on typing.
Smooth paste handling: transition-[height] 150ms on auto-expand for large pastes
Keyboard hint below input: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/40 — Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line. Hidden on mobile.
Character count when >500 chars: text-muted-foreground/40, changes to text-loss/40 when >4000 chars
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser
userStories.notes: Composer-style container with focus border transition, animate-pulse shimmer during loading, send/stop button crossfade (Square icon for stop), Cmd/Ctrl+Enter send, auto-focus on mount and after loading, global / shortcut to focus, keyboard hints hidden on mobile, character count >500 with danger color >4000.

userStories.title: Redesign Chat Sidebar — Desktop Polish
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished sidebar for managing conversations with better visual hierarchy and interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Width increased from w-56 to w-64
Header: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/5 bg-white/1 px-3 py-2.5
Conversations label: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider
New chat button: icon-only Plus, rounded bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary/20 text-primary p-1.5 with tooltip. Cmd+Shift+N shortcut.
Date group headers: Today, Yesterday, Previous 7 Days, Older. font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/50 uppercase. Sticky within group (sticky top-0 bg-card z-10).
Active conversation: bg-primary/5 border border-primary/20 text-foreground with left accent bar border-l-2 border-primary. Auto-scrolls into view.
Inactive: hover:bg-white/2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground
Conversation preview: first ~40 chars of last AI response in text-muted-foreground/40 truncate
Conversation meta: relative time + message count (e.g. 2h ago · 8 msgs)
Delete button: opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-loss/10 hover:text-loss. Delete animation: slide-out-left + fade.
Empty state: MessageSquare icon h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground/20 + No conversations yet + Start a new chat to begin
Bottom scroll fade gradient and keyboard navigation (Up/Down arrows, Enter to select)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Mobile Sidebar Drawer
userStories.description: As a trader on mobile, I want to access my conversation history via a slide-over drawer so that I can switch between conversations on any device.
acceptanceCriteria: Install shadcn Sheet component if not available (bunx shadcn@latest add sheet)
Hamburger/menu button in chat header, visible only on sm:hidden: rounded p-2 hover:bg-white/5 text-muted-foreground with Menu icon
Sheet opens from left containing full ChatSidebar component
Sheet overlay: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm. Panel: w-72 bg-card border-r border-white/10
Selecting conversation closes drawer with 100ms delay (user sees selection highlight first)
Sheet close button: X icon with hover:bg-white/5 rounded p-1
Swipe-to-close gesture supported on touch devices
Active conversation scrolled into view on drawer open
Sidebar component reused — same component in desktop and mobile via onSelect callback
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser at mobile viewport widths

userStories.title: Redesign Model Selector / Mode Toggle
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished mode toggle between Chat and Report that clearly indicates which mode I'm in.
acceptanceCriteria: Container: flex items-center gap-2 border-b border-white/5 px-3 py-2 sm:px-4
Toggle group: flex rounded border border-white/10 bg-white/1 p-0.5
Toggle buttons: flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded px-3 py-1.5 font-mono text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider transition-all
Active: bg-primary/10 text-primary. Inactive: text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-white/2
Icons: MessageSquare for Chat, FileText for Reports (h-3 w-3) + text labels
Active indicator slides between tabs via transition-all duration-200 (absolute-positioned highlight div)
Active report count badge on Reports tab when reports are generating: h-4 min-w-4 rounded-full bg-accent/20 text-accent font-mono text-[9px], pulses gently
Mobile hamburger button sits to the left of toggle in same header row
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Polish Message Renderer — Code Blocks, Tables, and Markdown
userStories.description: As a trader, I want AI responses with properly styled code blocks, tables, and markdown so that data-heavy responses are readable and professional.
acceptanceCriteria: Code blocks: language label top-left, copy button top-right. Header bar: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-white/5 bg-white/2 px-3 py-1.5
Code block container: rounded border border-white/5 bg-[#0a0a0a] overflow-hidden mb-3. Content: p-3 overflow-x-auto
Code block line numbers for >5 lines: text-muted-foreground/20 select-none pr-3 border-r border-white/5 mr-3
Code copy feedback: Check icon + Copied text-profit text-[10px] for 2s
Inline code: bg-white/5 border border-white/5 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-xs text-primary

Tables: horizontal scroll wrapper with rounded border. Header: bg-white/2, cells: px-3 py-2 font-mono text-[10px] uppercase. Body: text-foreground border-b border-white/2. Alternating rows: even:bg-white/1
Table row hover: hover:bg-white/3 transition-colors
Table numeric alignment: cells with numbers get text-right tabular-nums. P&L values auto-colored text-profit or text-loss
Table scroll indicator: right-edge fade bg-linear-to-l from-white/3 when overflowing
Blockquotes: border-l-2 border-accent/30 bg-accent/2 rounded-r pl-3 pr-2 py-2 mb-3
Links: text-accent underline with external link icon for external URLs
Bold text: text-foreground font-medium. Ordered list numbers: text-accent/50
Image lightbox: click opens fixed overlay bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm with full-size image. Esc to close.
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser with variety of markdown content

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Form Section
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished report generation form that feels premium and is easy to use.
acceptanceCriteria: Form container: responsive w-full lg:w-[420px] shrink-0 instead of fixed w-[400px]
Form header: border-b border-white/5 bg-white/1 px-4 py-3 with FileText icon + New Report label
Section labels: font-mono text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider mb-2
Prompt textarea: composer-style container matching chat input (rounded border border-white/10 bg-white/1 p-1). Focus: border-accent/40
Date range: side by side with arrow separator. Quick date presets row above: Last 7 days, Last 30 days, This month, Last month. Active preset highlighted.
Date validation: end >= start, inline error text-loss text-[10px] with shake animation
Generate button: full width rounded bg-accent/10 hover:bg-accent/20 text-accent uppercase. Loading: spinner + Generating. Disabled: opacity-30. active:scale-[0.98]
Form reset after submission: textarea clears with fade, dates persist. Subtle success flash bg-profit/5 for 500ms
Suggested prompts: icon per prompt, clicking fills textarea (not sends). Arrow on hover.
Prompt character count bottom-right, changes to text-loss/40 when >2000 chars
Consistent space-y-4 between sections
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Report History Panel
userStories.description: As a trader, I want a polished report history panel with real progress tracking, clear status indicators, and easy access to downloads.
acceptanceCriteria: Panel header: Report History label with report count badge (12). Refresh button: RefreshCw icon that spins 500ms on click.
Report cards: rounded border border-white/5 bg-white/1 p-3 hover:border-white/10. Title, status badge, relative date (full date on hover).
Status badges: QUEUED (muted), GENERATING (accent animate-pulse), COMPLETE (profit), FAILED (loss). All inline-flex rounded border font-mono text-[10px] uppercase
Completed card extras: token usage (12.4k tokens), time-to-complete (2m 34s), success left border (border-l-2 border-profit/20), PDF download opens in new tab
Active report progress: real pipeline data from getReportStatus. Stage labels: Queued, Building context, Analyzing round N, Generating PDF N charts, Uploading.
Real progress bar: h-1 rounded-full. Width mapped to stage (5% queued to 95% uploading, analyzing scales with currentRound). Smooth transition-all duration-700.
Stats row during analyzing: Round N, N tool calls, N charts (if >0)
Failed card: border-l-2 border-loss/20, truncated error text expandable on click, retry button with active:scale-[0.98]
New report slides in at top with animate-fade-in-up. Generating card gets subtle glow shadow.
Empty state: FileText icon with slow pulse + No reports yet + Generate your first analysis report
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser

userStories.title: Redesign Report Interface — Layout and Responsiveness
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the report interface to work well on all screen sizes with a clean layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Desktop: side-by-side form + history (flex gap-3 lg:gap-4 h-full)
Tablet (md): same side-by-side, form narrows to w-[340px]
Mobile (below lg): stack vertically, form collapsible to New Report bar after first submission to avoid dominating viewport
Overall container: flex flex-col lg:flex-row gap-3 h-full overflow-hidden
History panel: flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden with scroll
Bottom fade on scrollable areas: bg-linear-to-t from-card to-transparent h-8
Report complete notification: when report finishes while on Chat tab, Reports toggle badge pulses and count updates
Mode selector header remains full width above both panels
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser at multiple viewport sizes

userStories.title: Overall Layout Polish and Integration
userStories.description: As a trader, I want the entire AI section to feel cohesive with consistent spacing, borders, transitions, and keyboard shortcuts throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: Main container (page.tsx): h-[calc(100vh-4.5rem)] flex flex-col overflow-hidden — no clips or double scrollbars
Sidebar + chat share single rounded container on desktop (sidebar gets border-r border-white/5, outer has rounded border border-white/5 bg-card overflow-hidden)
Sequential mode transitions: outgoing fades out 100ms, incoming fades in 200ms
Custom thin scrollbar for message area and sidebar: 4px width, rgba(255,255,255,0.05) thumb, scoped to AI section
Smooth auto-scroll to bottom with debounced rapid updates (100ms batch)
Loading skeletons match real content dimensions (no layout shift)
Global keyboard shortcuts: / focuses input, Cmd+Shift+N new conversation, Escape blurs input. Only active on AI page.
React error boundary: terminal-styled error with retry button instead of white screen
Focus management: conversation switch -> input focus, mobile drawer focus trap, return focus on close
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable typewriter, fade-in, shimmer via motion-safe: prefix
Remove all hardcoded #00d4ff — use text-accent and bg-accent CSS variables
Remove all hardcoded border colors — use border-white/N opacity pattern consistently
Typecheck passes (bun run check)
Build passes (bun run build)
Verify in browser

userStories.title: E2E Tests for AI Chat UI Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned AI chat interface so that we can verify the new UI works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file: tests/e2e/ai-chat.spec.ts
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes
Test: Empty state renders with time-aware greeting, capability pills, and suggested query cards
Test: Clicking suggested query populates input and shows arrow indicator on hover
Test: Sidebar renders on desktop with date group headers, hidden on mobile
Test: Sidebar shows conversation preview text and message count
Test: Mobile drawer opens/closes on menu button click
Test: Selecting conversation loads messages and auto-focuses input
Test: Mode toggle switches between Chat and Reports with sliding indicator
Test: Chat input accepts text, send button enables, Shift+Enter creates newline
Test: Stop button appears when loading, send button when idle
Test: User messages have $ prefix with left border, AI messages in cards with arrow prefix
Test: Scroll-to-bottom button appears when scrolled up
Test: Copy button on hover of AI message card shows Copied feedback
Test: Keyboard shortcut / focuses input
All tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
Typecheck passes (bun run check)

userStories.title: E2E Tests for AI Reports UI Redesign
userStories.description: As a developer, I want E2E tests for the redesigned reports interface so that we can verify the new UI works correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file: tests/e2e/ai-reports.spec.ts
All new UI elements have data-testid attributes
Test: Report form renders with prompt textarea, date inputs, quick date presets, generate button
Test: Quick date presets fill in date fields correctly
Test: Date validation shows error with shake when end < start
Test: Clicking suggested prompt fills textarea (not sends)
Test: Prompt character count appears when >500 chars
Test: Report history panel renders with count badge in header
Test: Status badges display correctly with correct colors
Test: Completed reports show token usage, time-to-complete, and PDF download button
Test: Failed reports show error text and retry button
Test: Layout responsive: side-by-side desktop, stacked mobile with collapsible form
Test: Generate button disabled when prompt empty
Test: Refresh button spins icon on click
Test: Active report count badge on Reports toggle when generating
All tests pass (bun run test:e2e)
